title: Tales of Glimmerite
description: Dive into the mysterious depths of caves where new ores and adventures await you.
body:
![Tales of Glimmerite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48d8eb291cd3c7837ef04a6699234a26096dda51.png)

### Dive into the mysterious depths of caves where new ores and adventures await you. Discover the power of Glimmerite, a rare and luminous ore that will unlock new crafting possibilities. Uncover hidden treasures, craft powerful armor, and explore new mechanics that will transform your mining experience. Ready to dive deep and uncover the secrets of the underground?


<details>
<summary>What the mod adds</summary>

- New tools
- New armor
- New ore being generated
- New items
- Fountain with a chest of resources generated around the world
- New exchanges with merchants
- New achievements
- Enchanted Glimmerite Ore

</details>


<details>
<summary>Supported languages</summary>

- English
- Spanish
- Chinese (Simplified)
- Portuguese (Brazilian)
- Russian

</details>
